summary: Current value at 60 (18th percentile), strong mean reversion signal - all 7 historical cases where value was ≤60 showed increase 11 days later. Saturday (Feb 14) avg 73.4 vs Tuesday (Feb 3) avg 64.1.
content: Daily data analysis over last 3 months: mean=68.2, std=8.3. Current value of 60 on Feb 3 is at 18th percentile. 11-day change base rate: 56% increase, 39% decrease, 5% no change. When starting from ≤60, 7/7 cases showed increase 11 days later (range: +6 to +43). Day-of-week effect: Saturday avg 73.4 vs Tuesday avg 64.1. Weekly data from 12-month view shows latest week at 31 (below mean of 34.9). All signals point toward increase.
